# Beyond _crumbs,_ we craft  the _timeless._

A Parisian pûÂtisserie tucked on Thomas Street, Limerick. Hand-laminated croissants, slow-built entremets, and small-batch cakes ã made every morning, sold out by lunch.

\[ Nô¯01 \] Our Story

## Quiet patience,  _extraordinary_  pastry.

Tucked away on Thomas Street, Angel Dust began with one quiet obsession: bring the elegance and rigour of a Parisian pûÂtisserie to the cobbled streets of Limerick.

Every croissant laminated by hand. Every entremet built layer by layer the day before service. We don't take shortcuts ã and yes, that's why we sometimes sell out by 2pm.

Five plates, written for the season. The counter shifts each week ã what's here is what's true today.

Cakes and pastries sell out quickly. Fill this in by Tuesday and we'll have your order ready for collection from Thursday onward. We'll confirm by email or phone within 24 hours.

- We confirm within 24 hours
- 48 hours notice for custom cakes
